channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Business & Economic Policy
channel.description: Strictly Zimbabwe business, finance, mining, investment and economic-policy stories — curated from foreign press and policy press. Each item ships with a branded headline card for social autolists.

item.title: Zimbabwe signs million-dollar schools partnership
item.description: ZIMBABWE has signed a multi-million-dollar deal to construct 1 000 schools across its 10 provinces. The Ministry of Primary and Sec­ondary Education... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscri #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Mining firm seeks to exhume 35 graves
item.description: Tapiwa Chirume A MINING firm, Cuprum Copper Zimbabwe (Pvt) Ltd, has applied to exhume and rebury 35 human remains in Gokwe North... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimbabwe’s top critical mineral could be in focus as the US commits $300 million to detach from China
